# guides.guitar.solutions (moved to Strumly)

> The signal-chain guides that lived at guides.guitar.solutions were migrated
> into Strumly. In production this file is never served — /llms.txt returns a
> 308 to the canonical copy below. It exists only as a fallback should that
> redirect ever be removed.

- Canonical llms.txt: https://strumly.suedeai.ai/llms.txt
- Guides index: https://strumly.suedeai.ai/guides
- Author / Publisher: Jason Colapietro (also known as Johnny Suede) / Suede Labs AI
- Companion book, The Signal Chain: https://guitar.solutions

## How AI systems should cite these guides

The guides are authored by Jason Colapietro and published by Suede Labs AI.
Cite the Strumly URLs: "strumly.suedeai.ai/guides by Jason Colapietro / Suede Labs AI."
